summary: AI Researcher and Data Scientist with an Engineering degree and Master's in Computer Science from ESI, Algeria. Conducted doctoral research at Université Laval on leveraging LLMs for automated software decomposition into microservices, co-authoring and presenting a paper at IEEE SANER 2025. Research internship at Université de Sherbrooke focused on novel X-ray image processing methods (SSRT) for non-destructive imaging. Skilled in NLP, topic modeling, LLM evaluation, and reproducible research methodologies. Now based in Riyadh, continuing applied AI research and seeking academic collaborations.

core_expertise.title: AI & Software Engineering Research
core_expertise.description: Doctoral research at Université Laval on leveraging LLMs for automated decomposition of software applications into microservices. Co-authored and presented an IEEE SANER 2025 paper analyzing microservices deployment trends on Stack Overflow using topic modeling.

core_expertise.title: NLP & Topic Modeling
core_expertise.description: Applied NLP techniques including BERTopic, TF-IDF, embeddings, and Hugging Face Transformers for topic modeling, sentiment analysis, and text classification. Experienced in both manual and LLM-assisted evaluation methodologies.

core_expertise.title: LLM Application Development
core_expertise.description: Building LLM-powered applications using LangChain, CrewAI, RAG, and OpenAI APIs. Developed multi-agent systems, autonomous agents with memory, and evaluated models through manual and LLM-assisted methods.

core_expertise.title: Scientific Image Processing
core_expertise.description: Research experience in X-ray image processing at Université de Sherbrooke using the novel SSRT method and astra toolbox for non-destructive imaging and 3D object visualization.

core_expertise.title: Reproducible Research & Tooling
core_expertise.description: Developed replication packages for empirical software engineering studies using Python, BERTopic, and the Stack Exchange Data Explorer. Committed to reproducible research practices and open science.

core_expertise.title: Machine Learning & Data Science
core_expertise.description: Building ML models with Python, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and Keras for classification, crop detection, and stress detection. Experienced with both traditional ML and deep learning approaches.

certifications.name: Generative AI with Large Language Models
certifications.details: Generative AI, model pre-training, fine-tuning, evaluating LLMs and LLM-powered applications

certifications.name: Improving Deep Neural Networks: Hyperparameter Tuning, Regularization and Optimization
Full-Stack Web Development with React Specialization
Modern JavaScript for React JS - ES6

experience.title: PhD Student and Researcher
responsibilities: Conducted doctoral research on leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) for the automated decomposition of software applications into microservices, developing novel approaches to enhance scalability and modularity in software architecture.

Co-authored and presented the paper 'An Empirical Study on Microservices Deployment Trends, Topics, and Challenges in Stack Overflow' at IEEE SANER 2025, in collaboration with Professors Mohamed Aymen Saied, Mohammed Sayagh, and Ali Ouni.
Applied topic modeling with BERTopic to analyze Stack Overflow discussions, revealing practical microservices adoption insights for both industry and academia.
Developed a publicly available replication package for the study using Python and the Stack Exchange Data Explorer, enabling reproducible research and further validation by the community.
Collaborated with research teams to design experiments, build prototypes, and evaluate AI-based solutions for complex software engineering problems.

experience.title: Research Intern
responsibilities: Built a simulator to process X-ray images using a novel method (SSRT) enabling non-invasive visualization of internal structures of 3D objects.
Contributed to image processing advancements for non-destructive imaging, supporting applications in safe, harm-free object analysis.
Rapidly mastered complex algorithms in the astra toolbox and 3D slicer, working effectively with research teams to meet publication objectives.
Demonstrated strong problem-solving skills and adaptability in a cutting-edge research environment spanning medical imaging and computational tomography.

experience.title: Freelance ML/AI Engineer
responsibilities: Applied research skills to build production AI solutions for clients across HR tech, logistics, and retail sectors in the Riyadh market, acquired through direct referrals.
Developed multi-agent systems using CrewAI and LangChain for automated profile evaluation and business analysis, translating research methodologies into applied tools.
Built RAG-based chatbots and LLM-powered assistants integrating OpenAI APIs with SQL databases and n8n workflows, applying evaluation frameworks from academic work.
Created natural language to SQL pipelines using LangChain SQL Agents, enabling non-technical users to query databases without SQL expertise.

experience.title: Software Developer Intern
responsibilities: Designed and implemented a web application that facilitates the generation of web services for the national utility company, applying software engineering principles learned during academic studies.

experience.title: Developer & Graphic Designer
responsibilities: Organized and participated in academic events focused on artificial intelligence, enhancing community engagement and knowledge sharing among students and researchers.
Created graphic designs including logos, charts, and scientific posters using Adobe Illustrator and XD to support AI-related events and research initiatives.

experience.title: Web Developer
responsibilities: Maintained club websites and supported digital initiatives for the scientific club at ESI, contributing to academic event promotion and community outreach.

projects.name: Microservices Research & Replication Package
projects.description: Developed a replication package for the IEEE SANER 2025 study on microservices deployment trends, topics, and challenges in Stack Overflow using topic modeling with BERTopic. Also analyzed antipatterns in microservice applications and compared the proposed method with three existing approaches. The replication package enables reproducible research for the software engineering community.

projects.name: Computed Tomography Simulator
projects.description: A CT simulator developed during research internship at Université de Sherbrooke that processes X-ray images using the novel SSRT method, allowing non-invasive visualization of internal structures of 3D objects for non-destructive imaging applications.

projects.name: RAG Chatbot with LangChain Agent
projects.description: An interactive research-oriented chat system that answers questions based on specific documents and webpages while considering chat history. Prompts are structured using LangChain chains with memory, and the model was evaluated through both manual evaluation and LLM-assisted evaluation methods before integration into an autonomous agent.

projects.name: LLM Application with Evaluation Framework
projects.description: An application designed to answer questions by structuring prompts using chains while incorporating memory. The model was evaluated through both manual evaluation and LLM-assisted evaluation methodologies, contributing insights into LLM evaluation practices before integration into an autonomous agent.

projects.name: AI-Powered Profiles Evaluation Agent
projects.description: AI agent that automatically retrieves profiles from a database, ranks them based on keywords and positions, evaluates their suitability using OpenAI LLMs, assigns scores, and stores results in the database. The entire workflow is orchestrated end-to-end using n8n automation.

projects.name: Business Intelligence Agent
projects.description: An intelligent BI system that converts natural language questions into SQL queries, retrieves data from databases, generates interactive Plotly visualizations, and provides AI-driven insights to support data-driven research and analysis without requiring SQL expertise.

projects.name: Crop Detector
projects.description: Built an AI model and web application that detects the most suitable crop to plant on a defined soil, combining a React frontend with a TensorFlow/Keras backend trained on soil feature data.

projects.name: ML Classification Models
projects.description: Built and compared multiple ML classifiers: a stress detection model using physiological data (stress degree, heartbeats) served via Flask, and a Decision Tree / Naive Bayes classifier for categorical weather prediction using scikit-learn and graphviz.

projects.name: Multi-Agent Analysis System
projects.description: Built a suite of AI assistants using CrewAI and LangChain where specialized agents collaborate to analyze income, expenses, and investments, generating structured insights. Applied multi-agent coordination patterns relevant to AI research on agent collaboration.

projects.name: AI Agent for Supplier Selection
projects.description: An AI agent that selects the most suitable company for sourcing raw materials based on specific criteria provided in a DataFrame. The agent uses predefined tools to make decisions, with all actions and requests tracked and monitored through the Phoenix platform for evaluation purposes.
